criteria.description: Write-side feature_dir.parent.parent root walks (emit/wpl/lifecycle_events/store/coord R5) deleted; root sourced from resolve_canonical_root/get_main_repo_root; WP01 net + tests/status + tests/specify_cli/coordination green (verification-by-deletion).

criteria.notes: Verified on the integrated lane-h tree (WP02-06 + WP08); 68 adoption tests green.

criteria.description: core/worktree.py placement joins compose from resolve_placement_only; before/after on-disk placement path byte-identical (idempotency).

criteria.description: status-transition write surface = resolve_status_surface (coord authority); positive assertion surface==coord-dir AND !=primary_root under coord topology.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/write_side/test_characterization_root_walks.py::test_coord_status_write_surface_is_coord_authority_never_primary (surface under .worktrees, NOT under primary kitty-specs); WP05 5c33ff5a1.

criteria.description: write-target = resolve_placement_only(...).destination_ref; the WP01 topology-true oracle AND test_save_supports_identity_bearing_legacy_mission flip from the buggy git-HEAD value to CWD-invariant target_branch; before/after on-disk-target idempotency proven.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/write_side/test_characterization_write_target.py (oracle flipped to CWD-invariant target_branch; coord arm agrees); WP05 5c33ff5a1; keystone test_flat_write_target_is_cwd_invariant_base_not_head confirms the adopted resolver stays on base off-target.
criteria.notes: Verified on the integrated lane-h tree (WP05 merged). Deferred residual: the BookkeepingTransaction legacy-override on git HEAD (#1716, C-003) is NOT this seam and does not bite the genuine simple case (HEAD==base) — see issue-matrix #1716 row + keystone docstring.

criteria.description: tests/architectural/test_no_write_side_rederivation.py (required, line-scoped allow-list, with a 'ratchet bites' self-test) passes on the post-adoption tree.

criteria.description: _identity_for_request reduced to consume the resolvers; grep shows no surviving inline .parent.parent / coord_branch-or-_current_branch / mid8 recompute (only the deferred S2 ladder, allow-listed).

criteria.notes: The bounded _identity_for_request reduction (WP05) is verified by the ratchet on the integrated tree; the FR-006 dead-fragment export deletion is WP07 (see FR-006 row).

criteria.description: lanes-dir write routes via resolve_status_surface->resolve_lanes_dir; lanes.json on coord authority under coord topology, flat under no-coord; idempotency preserved.

negative_invariants.description: No adopted write op changes on-disk worktree/coord topology before/after (NFR-004 idempotency).
No coord write ever resolves its surface to primary_root (C-007; never flatten a coord write).
In the all-base/flat case, ZERO .worktrees/ or coordination-surface paths are read or written (NFR-006/SC-007).
No flattened write resolves destination_ref to git HEAD (the FR-004 latent bug); it is CWD-invariant target_branch.
No new authority/resolver/factory field is introduced; resolution.py is touched only by FR-006 deletion (C-001).
